name: heimdall
tagline: A self-hosted dashboard for organizing and accessing your services
description: Heimdall is a self hosted application dashboard for organizing links to your services. It automatically detects many apps to show status and logos, making a clean, centralized homepage for homelab or server environments.

features.title: Application Dashboard
features.description: Displays links to self-hosted services in a centralized interface

features.title: Service Organization
features.description: Groups services into categories for easier navigation

features.title: Visual Service Cards
features.description: Represents services with icons and descriptive labels

features.title: Search Functionality
features.description: Allows users to quickly locate services

features.title: Responsive Interface
features.description: Adapts layout for desktop and mobile screens

features.title: Self-Hosted Dashboard
features.description: Run the dashboard on your own servers
